description_long: This is a modern sectional lounge with a sleek, minimalist design, featuring three main seating sections and an extended chaise on the right. The seat and backrest surfaces are upholstered in a teal, leather-like material with a grid of square tufted stitching, giving it a plush, cushioned appearance. The base and sides are finished in a contrasting white material, likely synthetic or vinyl, which wraps around the lower structure. The lounge sits low to the ground on short, barely visible legs, enhancing its contemporary look. The backrest is segmented into three equal sections, each with subtle horizontal and vertical tufting, and there are no visible armrests. This piece is designed for comfort and style, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or modern public spaces.
description: A modern teal and white sectional lounge with tufted upholstery, a chaise extension, and no armrests. Its sleek, low-profile design is both stylish and comfortable.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seating sections, a right-side chaise, and the full grid-tufted teal upholstery.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the continuous backrest without armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, white base and the segmented backrest panels.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the chaise extension and the seamless transition between seat and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three attached seat cushions and three attached backrest cushions, all equally sized and arranged in a straight line, with an extended chaise section on the right.
attribute_backrest_design: Straight, medium-height backrest divided into three equal segments, each with square tufted detailing and a slight backward angle.
attribute_leg_style: Short, block-style legs barely visible, likely made of plastic or metal, positioned at the corners for stability.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Grid-patterned tufting with square stitching on both seat and backrest, creating a quilted, plush appearance.
